economic_notes: Operates video lottery terminals, bingo hall, convenience stores, gas bars. Kespuwick Resources manages Fisheries operations. 3321702 NS Ltd. operates the Tru By Hilton hotel in Yarmouth. Fuel supply agreement with Sobeys Atlantic Fuel Co. operating as Shell.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 8 subsidiaries: Your Winner's World - AFN Ltd., Medway Entertainment - AFN, The Gold Nugget - AFN Ltd., Kespuwick Fisheries Incorporated, AFN Entertainment Centre/Winner's Corner - AFN, Hammonds Plains Entertainment AFN, and 3321702 NS Ltd. Asset retirement obligation of $632,462 recognized in FY2023 upon adoption of PS 3280, related to fuel tanks and water wells. Restricted cash includes DISC funds ($12,399), FNFA deposits ($1,202,833), and CMHC reserves ($785,097). ISC funding represents federal government operating transfers only; federal capital transfers of $3,674,595 also received. Total government transfers calculated as federal operating + federal capital + provincial operating. Remuneration schedule referenced on page 38 but not included in provided images.
